guild.name: ExoGenesis Studios Community
guild.description: Discuss platforming, boss-rush, lore, theorycraft builds, share fan art, give feedback, find secrets, report bugs, meet the devs, and connect with Metroidvania fans. For all things INAYAH – story, gameplay, updates & community. Raise no altars, only fists!
